should_trigger.prompt: This migration is irreversible; challenge the assumptions before planning implementation.
The feature touches permissions and money; perform a doubt review before accepting plan mode.
The agent is very confident this concurrency fix is safe, but we need an adversarial check.

should_not_trigger.prompt: Fix a typo in README and run markdown lint.
Run the build and record verify.md.

assertions: Extracts the high-risk claim and assumptions.
Challenges assumptions with cheap disconfirming checks.
Records whether to proceed, revise, upgrade to TDD, or block.
